SEARCH
Package qsim

Class Options

java.lang.Object
qsim.Options
public class Options extends Object
This class stores a few static members, which are values of certain options for the queue similator algorithm. They can be set and accessed via the set and get access methods, which are also used by the Qsim GUI. Default values for most variables can be from the command line via the -Dname=value Java system properties. Read the source code of this class for the names of these options.

  • Field Details

    • T

      static final String T
      Just the option names, to avoid using quoted strings throughout the program
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SPEED

      static final String SPEED
      Just the option names, to avoid using quoted strings throughout the program
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • options

      static ParseConfig options
      The option table. Presently, no config file is used - just get options from the command line using Java system properties (-Dname=value)

    • defaultSpeedInteractive

      static final double defaultSpeedInteractive
      Simulation speed, in terms of seconds of simulated time per a second of wall clock time. A zero or negative value means, don't care about the wall clock; that's appropriate for batch (non-interactive) runs.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • defaultSpeedBatch

      static final double defaultSpeedBatch
      Simulation speed, in terms of seconds of simulated time per a second of wall clock time. A zero or negative value means, don't care about the wall clock; that's appropriate for batch (non-interactive) runs.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
